sigWerErrors.reason: 'hesap ekstresi' (account statement) and 'web sitesi' (website) are completely different concepts, changing the meaning of the request.
'İstediğim' (what I requested) and 'Henüz' (yet/still) are different words and change the structure and meaning of the sentence.
The difference is between informal ('misin') and formal ('misiniz') address; the meaning remains the same.
